issues.message: Some form controls (filter selects / search inputs) lack associated labels, which screen readers will announce only by placeholder.
Filter dropdowns and the cruise search input are missing accessible labels.
Layout consistency score is the lowest on the site (~48). Horizontal alignment of citation result rows and filter rail items could be tightened.

repair_instructions: On data.html and expeditions.html, add visible or visually-hidden <label> elements (or aria-label attributes) to every <select> and <input> in the filter bars and search box so assistive tech announces their purpose (e.g. 'Filter by variable', 'Filter by status', 'Search datasets').

On publications.html, audit the citation list and faceted filter rail for horizontal alignment: ensure the DOI/BibTeX/RIS button row, year tag, and abstract text share consistent left edges, and that filter group headers and counts align across the rail. Aim to reduce row-bottom alignment misses.

page_presence_resolved./people/dr-yuki-okafor: person.html exists and renders Dr. Yuki Okafor profile
